queryName: EC2 Network ACL Ineffective Denied Traffic
expectedValue: Traffic denial should be effective (Action is 'Deny' when CidrBlock is '0.0.0.0/0')%!(EXTRA string=InboundRule)
actualValue: Traffic denial is ineffective (Action is 'Deny' when CidrBlock is different from '0.0.0.0/0'%!(EXTRA string=InboundRule)
